pdf_urls_no_dom: ><style>.block-1 .cta_wrapper a, .block-1 .cta_wrapper button, .block-1 .popup-btn{ padding: 10px 20px 10px 10px; color: #fff; background: #2271b1; border-radius: 3px; border:0; cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; min-height: 0px; line-height: 1.35em; text-transform: initial; } #block-1 { display: flex; justify-content: left; } #block-1 .pdfp_wrapper { width: 100%; } #block-1 .iframe_wrapper { height: 840px; width: 100%; } #block-1 .pdfp_wrapper iframe { height: 100%; width: 100%; } .block-1 .popup-trigger { display: flex; justify-content: undefined; } .block-1 .popup-trigger img, .block-1 .popup-trigger-text { height: 200px; width: 300px; } .block-1btn { background: #2271b1; color: #fff; padding: 10px 20px 10px 10px; }@media only screen and (max-width: 1024px) { #block-1 .iframe_wrapper { height: 700px; width: 100%; } } @media only screen and (max-width: 640px) { #block-1 .iframe_wrapper{ height: 400px !important; width: 100% !important; } }</style><div class=
